corrections.note: Image appears to read παρῆν; transcription already matches, so no body correction needed here.
Body appears correct; included no correction.
Printed apparatus reads 'φυσι ομορφοτ ℵ' (abbrev. for ομόρφωτ. / similar), not 'omorphot' in Latin letters.

corrections.current: θεους] ταυθ ℵ* παρʼ παντα A

Entry itself is fine; no correction needed.

corrections.current: καλλοηης και] και καλλ. ℵc.a om και A

Bottom page number and signature are present and correctly transcribed.

uncertain.note: The Greek abbreviation after φυσι is hard to resolve; transcript's Latinized 'omorphot' is certainly wrong, but exact polytonic expansion is uncertain.

notes: Running head and body are substantially correct. Apparatus has a few transcription issues; do not treat bottom page number 627 or RR 2 as body text.
